Example Article

First paragraph with a sidenote reference.1 This is the first footnote content. More text continues here.

Second paragraph with another reference.2 This is the second footnote with more detail about the topic.

Third paragraph with a final reference.3 A reader suggested an alternative approach, which has some merit.

Sidenotes

1

This is the first footnote content.

2

This is the second footnote with more detail about the topic.

3

A reader suggested an alternative approach, which has some merit.
